calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-09-2010 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-15-2010 Continued To Mar-19-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Dec-17-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Beldon Yee, #2647.

John A. Lofton, Esq. appeared for plaintiffs John Williams, an individual, John Hoffman, an individual, Dennis Higgs, an individual, David Grieve, an individual and James McCullough, a/k/a Jim McCulliugh, an individual.
No appearance by defendant Graham Kos, an individual.
Default was entered against defendant on September 21, 2009.
Doe defendants were dismissed today, December 17, 2009.
Order waiving witness appearance at default prove-up hearing was filed on October 13, 2009.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiffs John Williams, an individual, John Hoffman, an individual, Dennis Higgs, an individual, David Grieve, an individual and James McCullough, a/k/a Jim McCulliugh, an individual, and against the Defaulted Defendant Graham Kos, an individual, as follows:

Damages/Principal - $2,430,000.00.
Prejudgment Interest - $224,597.16.
Costs - $405.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $2,655,002.16.

Counsel for plaintiffs shall submit a proposed judgment to the Court no later than December 18, 2009.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-30-2009 Continued To Jan-29-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212
